title: barxja's Weaponry
body:
(Translation done with google translator)

**(aunque el mod solo esta en español ya que realmente no se como crear una traduccion coherente al ingles.)**

 

**_This mod requires geckolib to work properly._**

 

now the mod will take the name "barxja's Weaponry" as it is a completely different mod from the original with approximately 27% of its final content.

Mod weapons will now be divided into categories such as: Special Weapons, Unique Weapons and Line Weapons (common). Line weapons will range from iron, red copper, diamond and netherite.

 

**This mod currently has a total of 23 weapons, which are divided between:**

 

**Line arms:**
Katanas

Rapiers

Daggers

Zweihanders

Light swords

 

**Unique weapons:**
Rusty machete

 

**Special Weapons:**
Atronadora

Atronadora worn

 

**This mod also has its own workbenches and compatibility with Better combat and JEI.**
 
And apart from all of the above, this mod already has its first animated entity!
called "Mitigating Needle" which can be rarely found in the world at night in its corrupted stage. If you defeat it, it may drop an item that will serve to summon its original stage in which it will not be hostile towards you, although of course, you have to repair the item first for that!

Once you "tame" the mitigating needle you can take your new and peculiar companion on adventures, but if you prefer you can leave it in standby mode wherever you want just by right clicking. If the mitigator needle gets seriously injured it will go into "Down" mode so you can help it to get up again, but if you don't do it within a certain period of time... It will die!

The structure is much simpler, it is called "Containment of the Thunderer" and you can find it in the deserts with the worn out Thunderer inside it. You will need a diamond pickaxe to be able to open it and take the worn Atronadora with you.

 

And if that wasn't enough, I have also decided to add a special Lore to the mod that will continue to expand over time.


X: but isn't the Lore unnecessary?

Exactly! it's really unnecessary, but why not add it?

 

 

**_(Recommended to have the Jei mod to see the elaboration)_**

 


This mod will continue to be developed regardless of its popularity. As long as the creator or his pc is still alive.

 

I will try to get this mod to fabric but I really don't know if it is possible since I have no idea about programming, for the moment I will keep this mod for 1.20.1 until v3 arrives.

 ** Mod made with Mcreator**
